LSE-MS8-L4-13001400-MSVPA-PIN-API-02 • MS Visual and Performing Arts — Music Grade 8 • Compositional Techniques (Tension and Release) • Podcast Interview • Asian & Pacific Islander Narratives

The Bridge Track

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why did the girl drop the beat out before the gongs come back?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Build a full justification: make a claim about why the girl made the choice she made, explain the reasoning she gives in the dialogue, and state the conclusion about what happens to the gongs.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  MU:Cr3.2.8.a  |  MS Visual and Performing Arts — Music 6–8: Compositional Techniques (Tension and Release)
